title: SpeedGhasts
description: The mod adds Flight Speed enchantment books - an enchantment that increases the speed of Happy Ghasts.
body:
## This mod will make your Happy Ghasts **faster**!
![Enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b302b13642058c5c12e4ca159748c554bdeb9b38.png)

Just find the **_“Flight Speed”_** enchantment in **ruined portals**, apply it to a **harness**, and equip it on your **ghast**.

**Off you go, into the sky!**
